headline: Bob Iger reflects on 10 years of Shanghai Disneyland as it defies the Chinese pullback
summary: Shanghai Disneyland hit 100 million cumulative visitors in 2025, according to the company. It's a relatively new but important foothold in Disney's history.

raw.headline: Bob Iger reflects on 10 years of Shanghai Disneyland as it defies the Chinese pullback
raw.summary: Shanghai Disneyland hit 100 million cumulative visitors in 2025, according to the company. It's a relatively new but important foothold in Disney's history.

headline: Shanghai Disneyland celebrates 10th anniversary, hits 100 million visitors in 2025
summary: Shanghai Disneyland celebrated its 10th anniversary this week, with ex CEO Bob Iger flying in for the festivities. It's now the fifth largest theme park in the world and is bucking a bigger trend in China: consumption is poor. Retail sales dropped in May for the first time in three years. Iger explains why he's optimistic about the business in China.

headline: Former Disney CEO Bob Iger on what China has meant for the company
summary: Bob Iger, former chairman and CEO of The Walt Disney Company, sits down with CNBC’s Eunice Yoon on the 10th anniversary of Shanghai Disneyland to share his thoughts on China, AI, the theme park which he calls a career highlight as well as his own future post-Disney.
